title: Hershey (HSY) is a Top-Ranked Momentum Stock: Should You Buy?
text: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

title: The Hershey Company Earns Top Score on Human Rights Campaign's 2022 Corporate Equality Index
text: HERSHEY, Pa. , Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Hershey Company (NYSE: HSY) announced today that it received a score of 100 on the Human Rights Campaign Foundation's 2022 Corporate Equality Index (CEI), the nation's foremost benchmarking report measuring corporate policies and practices related to LGBTQ+ workplace equality.

title: 3 Food Stocks With Fair Chances to Top Estimates This Earnings Season
text: Food companies are gaining on favorable demand as well as efforts to boost offerings. Mondelez International (MDLZ), Hershey (HSY) and Beyond Meat (BYND) are likely to top earnings estimates this season.

title: The Hershey Company Recognized for Third Consecutive Year as One of America's Most JUST Companies by JUST Capital and CNBC
text: HERSHEY, Pa., Jan. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Hershey Company (NYSE: HSY) today announced the company has been named as one of America's Most JUST Companies by JUST Capital and media partner CNBC for the third consecutive year.

title: Hershey (HSY) Rallies More Than 30% in a Year: Here's Why
text: Hershey (HSY) is benefiting from better-than-expected consumer demand. Also, the company is undertaking buyouts to augment portfolio strength.

title: Fall in Love with Hershey's Valentine's Day Products, Then Hop Right into the Brand's Easter Lineup This Year!
text: HERSHEY, Pa., Jan. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hershey has a treat for everyone no matter the reason, season, or celebration.
